briefs.title: Liquor Licence Renewal Fees Rise for First Time Since 2010, Effective May 2026
briefs.summary: BC's LCRB is increasing annual liquor licence renewal fees effective May 1, 2026 — the first increase in over 15 years. Most hospitality licensees will see ~$75/year more; manufacturer fees vary by production volume.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated LCRB fee table and budget for higher renewal fees starting May 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB liquor licence renewal fee increases take effect
BC Serving It Right and Special Event Server training fee increase takes effect
